EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Failed to change the group {object.storage.fullpath} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} removed the group {object.storage.fullpath} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} changed the group {object.storage.fullpath} on host {event_src.host}
Failed to create a group on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} created the group "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
Failed to remove the group {object.storage.fullpath} on host {event_src.host}
